justification: Broadest seasonal-policy coverage and strongest pure-control baseline; retained as the control-oriented surrogate corpus.
Smallest 15-minute corpus that already supports explicit C_zon identification and the canonical calibrated v3.5 backend without additional live collection cost.
Much larger 15-minute corpus required new BOPTEST collection time, but still underperformed the prepared bootstrap corpus on rollout-safety metrics.
More targeted heating-focused recollection reduced cost relative to the full collected corpus, but still did not beat the prepared bootstrap corpus on 1-hour safety fidelity.
